baseline_prompt: What is our current demo status?
routed_prompt: Use project-context to summarize current demo status from readiness and acceptance reports.

baseline_prompt: Why does a player have low evidence?
routed_prompt: Use debug-ingestion to diagnose why a selected player has weak evidence and name the earliest failing ingestion stage.
notes: Use a fixed player name per benchmark run.

baseline_prompt: How should we close CHL data gaps?
routed_prompt: Use project-context and debug-ingestion to plan CHL cleanup from source-family status and gap reports.
Use validate-change to choose and run focused checks for a demo export change.
Use reviewer custom agent guidance to review ranking calibration risk and missing validation.
notes: High-assurance path should cost more but improve risk coverage.
